name: Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cherry pie filling and pitted cherries in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
2. Sprinkle the dry chocolate cake mix evenly over the cherries.
3. Cut the butter or margarine into small pieces and sprinkle them on top of the cake mix.
4. Do not stir or mix any ingredients together.
5. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes. As the cake bakes, the cherry filling, cake mix, and butter will mix together, resulting in a chocolate cake filled with cherries.
6. Serve with Cool Whip frosting.
